testCases.title: Welcome page displays correctly in both languages
testCases.description: Verify the welcome page shows Arabic and English text correctly with proper RTL/LTR layout
steps: Verify all text is properly translated
testCases.expectedResult: Welcome page renders correctly in both Arabic and English with proper text direction

testCases.title: Vehicle creation with all required fields
testCases.description: Test creating a new vehicle with make, model, year, and current mileage
testCases.expectedResult: Vehicle is created and displayed in the dashboard with correct information

testCases.title: Maintenance task scheduling
testCases.description: Verify maintenance tasks can be scheduled based on mileage and time intervals
steps: Add a maintenance task (e.g., Oil Change)
Verify task appears in task list
Verify due date is calculated correctly
testCases.expectedResult: Maintenance task is created with proper intervals and due date

testCases.title: Cost prediction chart displays data
testCases.description: Test that the cost trend chart renders with historical maintenance data
steps: Add multiple maintenance records with costs
Verify data points match entered costs
testCases.expectedResult: Cost trend chart displays with correct data points and anomaly highlighting

testCases.title: Task completion and history tracking
testCases.description: Verify completing a maintenance task updates history and recalculates next due date
steps: Verify next due date is calculated from new completion date
testCases.expectedResult: Task is marked complete, added to history, and next due date is recalculated

testCases.title: Multiple vehicle management
testCases.description: Test adding and switching between multiple vehicles
steps: Verify each vehicle shows its own maintenance data
Verify no data leakage between vehicles
testCases.expectedResult: Each vehicle maintains separate maintenance records

testCases.title: Bilingual date and number formatting
testCases.description: Verify dates and numbers are formatted according to locale settings
testCases.expectedResult: Dates and numbers are formatted correctly for each locale

testCases.title: Service task CRUD operations
testCases.description: Test creating, reading, updating, and deleting service tasks
steps: Verify task is removed from list
testCases.expectedResult: All CRUD operations work correctly for service tasks

testCases.title: Dashboard summary accuracy
testCases.description: Verify dashboard shows correct counts for upcoming and overdue tasks
testCases.expectedResult: Dashboard accurately reflects task status counts

testCases.title: Data persistence across app restarts
testCases.description: Verify all data persists after closing and reopening the app
steps: Verify all data is still present
testCases.expectedResult: All data persists correctly across app restarts via Isar database
